intro: Cynanchum oeaean, also known as Cynanchica oetaea, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, as well as its ability to improve cardiovascular health and reduce stress levels. The bioactive constituents of Cynanchum oeaean include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Cynanchum oeaean is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in the production of capsules and infusions to treat various health conditions.
